options.name: --force
options.description: Force regeneration even if files are up to date

options.name: --timestamp
options.description: Include generation timestamp in output files

options.name: --output
options.description: Custom output path for generated files

options.name: --assets-file
options.description: Assets file path for package inspection (build integration)

options.name: --target-framework
options.description: Target framework to inspect package metadata for (build integration)

options.name: --runtime-identifier
options.description: Runtime identifier used for assets target selection (build integration)

options.name: --targeting-pack-root
options.description: Override targeting pack root used for metadata references (build integration)
